plan:
## 🥗 Nutritional Guidelines
To maintain weight and manage health conditions, we need to focus on balanced nutrition with controlled calorie intake. The key targets for this person are:
- Daily calories: 1800-2000
- Macronutrient breakdown:
  - Protein: 1.6-2 grams per kilogram of body weight (100-120 grams)
  - Fat: 20-25% of daily calories
  - Carbohydrates: 55-60% of daily calories
  - Fiber: 25-30 grams
- Hydration: 2-3 liters of water per day

## 📅 7-Day Meal Plan

### Day 1
- Breakfast: Oats with milk and fruit (250 calories, 5g protein, 60g carbs, 5g fat)
  - 1 cup rolled oats
  - 1 cup milk (low-fat)
  - 1/2 banana
  - 1 tablespoon honey
- Lunch: Fish Tikka Masala with brown rice and mixed vegetables (400 calories, 30g protein, 50g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 2 boneless fish fillets (avoid chicken)
  - 2 tablespoons yogurt
  - 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  - 1/2 cup mixed vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, green beans)
  - 1/2 cup cooked brown rice
- Dinner: Lentil soup with whole wheat bread (400 calories, 20g protein, 60g carbs, 15g fat)
  - 1 cup cooked lentils
  - 2 cups vegetable broth
  - 1/4 cup chopped onion
  - 2 cloves garlic
  - 2 slices whole wheat bread

### Day 2
- Breakfast: Poha with nuts and dried fruits (200 calories, 5g protein, 40g carbs, 10g fat)
  - 1 cup poha flakes
  - 1/4 cup chopped almonds
  - 1/4 cup chopped walnuts
  - 1/2 cup dried fruits (cranberries, raisins)
- Lunch: Grilled fish with mixed greens salad and whole wheat roti (400 calories, 30g protein, 10g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 2 boneless fish fillets
  - 2 cups mixed greens
  - 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes
  - 1/4 cup chopped cucumber
  - 2 slices whole wheat roti
- Dinner: Vegetable Korma with brown rice (450 calories, 15g protein, 60g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (cauliflower, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 2 tablespoons yogurt
  - 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice

### Day 3
- Breakfast: Egg omelette with spinach and whole wheat toast (200 calories, 18g protein, 2g carbs, 10g fat)
  - 2 eggs
  - 1/4 cup chopped spinach
  - 2 slices whole wheat toast
- Lunch: Mixed vegetable stir-fry with tofu and brown rice (400 calories, 20g protein, 60g carbs, 15g fat)
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (broccoli, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 1/2 cup cubed tofu
  - 1 tablespoon vegetable oil
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice
- Dinner: Shrimp curry with mixed vegetables and brown rice (450 calories, 20g protein, 60g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 1 cup cooked shrimp
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (cauliflower, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 2 tablespoons coconut oil
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice

### Day 4
- Breakfast: Upma with nuts and dried fruits (250 calories, 5g protein, 40g carbs, 10g fat)
  - 1 cup upma flakes
  - 1/4 cup chopped almonds
  - 1/4 cup chopped walnuts
  - 1/2 cup dried fruits (cranberries, raisins)
- Lunch: Grilled fish with mixed greens salad and whole wheat roti (400 calories, 30g protein, 10g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 2 boneless fish fillets
  - 2 cups mixed greens
  - 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes
  - 1/4 cup chopped cucumber
  - 2 slices whole wheat roti
- Dinner: Lentil and vegetable curry with brown rice (450 calories, 20g protein, 60g carbs, 15g fat)
  - 1 cup cooked lentils
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (broccoli, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice

### Day 5
- Breakfast: Poha with milk and fruit (250 calories, 5g protein, 60g carbs, 5g fat)
  - 1 cup poha flakes
  - 1 cup milk (low-fat)
  - 1/2 banana
  - 1 tablespoon honey
- Lunch: Shrimp Tikka with mixed vegetables and brown rice (400 calories, 25g protein, 50g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 1 cup cooked shrimp
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (cauliflower, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 2 tablespoons yogurt
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice
- Dinner: Vegetable and tofu stir-fry with brown rice (450 calories, 20g protein, 60g carbs, 15g fat)
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (broccoli, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 1/2 cup cubed tofu
  - 1 tablespoon vegetable oil
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice

### Day 6
- Breakfast: Egg omelette with spinach and whole wheat toast (200 calories, 18g protein, 2g carbs, 10g fat)
  - 2 eggs
  - 1/4 cup chopped spinach
  - 2 slices whole wheat toast
- Lunch: Lentil and vegetable curry with brown rice (450 calories, 20g protein, 60g carbs, 15g fat)
  - 1 cup cooked lentils
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (broccoli, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice
- Dinner: Grilled fish with mixed greens salad and whole wheat roti (400 calories, 30g protein, 10g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 2 boneless fish fillets
  - 2 cups mixed greens
  - 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes
  - 1/4 cup chopped cucumber
  - 2 slices whole wheat roti

### Day 7
- Breakfast: Upma with nuts and dried fruits (250 calories, 5g protein, 40g carbs, 10g fat)
  - 1 cup upma flakes
  - 1/4 cup chopped almonds
  - 1/4 cup chopped walnuts
  - 1/2 cup dried fruits (cranberries, raisins)
- Lunch: Shrimp Tikka with mixed vegetables and brown rice (400 calories, 25g protein, 50g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 1 cup cooked shrimp
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (cauliflower, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 2 tablespoons yogurt
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice
- Dinner: Vegetable Korma with brown rice (450 calories, 15g protein, 60g carbs, 20g fat)
  - 1 cup mixed vegetables (cauliflower, bell peppers, carrots)
  - 2 tablespoons yogurt
  - 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  - 1 cup cooked brown rice

## ✅ Foods to Eat More
1. **Leafy greens** (spinach, kale, broccoli) for fiber, iron, and antioxidants.
2. **Berries** (blueberries, strawberries, raspberries) for antioxidants and fiber.
3. **Nuts and seeds** (almonds, walnuts, chia seeds) for healthy fats and protein.
4. **Fatty fish** (salmon, sardines, tuna) for omega-3 fatty acids and protein.
5. **Legumes** (lentils, chickpeas, black beans) for protein, fiber, and folate.
6. **Whole grains** (brown rice, quinoa, whole wheat bread) for fiber, vitamins, and minerals.
7. **Dairy** (low-fat milk, yogurt, cheese) for calcium and protein.
8. **Herbs and spices** (cumin, turmeric, ginger) for antioxidants and anti-inflammatory effects.
9. **Sweet potatoes** for fiber, vitamins, and minerals.
10. **Avocados** for healthy fats and fiber.

## ❌ Foods to Avoid
1. **Processed meats** (hot dogs, sausages, bacon) for high salt, preservatives, and saturated fats.
2. **Refined sugars** (cakes, pastries, candy) for high calorie, low nutrient content.
3. **Saturated and trans fats** (butter, lard, partially hydrogenated oils) for high cholesterol and heart disease risk.
4. **Excessive sodium** for high blood pressure risk.
5. **Fried foods** (french fries, fried chicken, doughnuts) for high calorie, low nutrient content.
6.

**Daily Target:** 1800 kcal, 80g protein

**Day 1:**
- Breakfast: Omelette with spinach, whole wheat roti (300 kcal, 20g protein)
- Lunch: Chicken salad with cucumber, tomato, carrots, whole wheat bread (400 kcal, 30g protein)
- Dinner: Grilled fish, brown rice, mixed vegetable sabzi (500 kcal, 40g protein)

**Day 2:**
- Breakfast: Poha with nuts, seeds and vegetables (350 kcal, 15g protein)
- Lunch: Lentil soup with whole wheat roti (450 kcal, 25g protein)
- Dinner: Roasted chicken, quinoa, mixed vegetable curry (550 kcal, 50g protein)

**Day 3:**
- Breakfast: Whole wheat paratha with egg, saag (310 kcal, 20g protein)
- Lunch: Grilled chicken sandwich with brown bread (420 kcal, 35g protein)
- Dinner: Baked beans, brown rice, mixed vegetables (480 kcal, 25g protein)

**Day 4:**
- Breakfast: Whole grain upma with nuts, seeds (320 kcal, 10g protein)
- Lunch: Chicken tikka salad with brown rice (440 kcal, 30g protein)
- Dinner: Shrimp biryani, mixed greens salad (560 kcal, 40g protein)

**Day 5:**
- Breakfast: Brown bread omelette (280 kcal, 18g protein)
- Lunch: Grilled chicken, quinoa, mixed vegetables (500 kcal, 45g protein)
- Dinner: Vegetable curry with brown rice (460 kcal, 15g protein)

**Day 6:**
- Breakfast: Yogurt parfait with granola, fruits (370 kcal, 20g protein)
- Lunch: Lentil salad with mixed vegetables (420 kcal, 25g protein)
- Dinner: Roasted chicken, brown rice, mixed vegetables (520 kcal, 50g protein)

**Day 7:**
- Breakfast: Whole wheat toast with scrambled eggs (320 kcal, 20g protein)
- Lunch: Grilled chicken salad with mixed greens (450 kcal, 40g protein)
- Dinner: Shrimp, whole wheat roti, mixed vegetables (500 kcal, 45g protein)

**Eat More:** Whole grains, Lean proteins, Fresh fruits, Vegetables, Low-fat dairy
**Avoid:** Fried foods, High-sugar foods, Processed meats, High-fat dairy, Refined carbohydrates
**Tips:** Drink 8-10 glasses of water, Eat smaller frequent meals, Incorporate physical activity.

**Patient: 70yr Male, BMI 24.7, Goal: Lose weight, Conditions: None, Diet: Non-vegetarian, Cuisine: Indian, Allergies: None, Activity: Moderate**

**Daily Target:** 2000 kcal, 80g protein

**Day 1:**
- Breakfast: Poha with Almonds, Banana and Milk
- Lunch: Brown Rice with Grilled Chicken, Mixed Vegetables and a Glass of Lemon Water
- Dinner: Whole Wheat Roti with Dal Makhani, Saag Paneer and Raita

**Eat More:** Leafy Greens, Berries, Almonds, Lean Chicken, Whole Wheat

**Avoid:** Red Meat, Fried Foods, High-Sugar Snacks, Processed Sweets, Processed Snacks

**Tips:** Drink plenty of water, Eat smaller portion sizes, Include fiber-rich foods in every meal.

**Daily Target:** 2200 kcal, 90g protein

**Day 1:**
- Breakfast: Idli with low-fat curd and fresh fruits
- Lunch: Brown rice, chickpea salad with cucumber, and whole wheat roti
- Dinner: Grilled fish, mixed vegetable curry, brown rice

**Day 2:**
- Breakfast: Whole wheat toast with scrambled eggs and low-fat milk
- Lunch: Quinoa and lentil salad with cucumber and tomatoes
- Dinner: Chicken tikka with brown bread and mixed vegetables

**Day 3:**
- Breakfast: Poha with roasted almonds and mixed fruits
- Lunch: Whole wheat roti, vegetable korma, and brown rice
- Dinner: Grilled chicken, mixed vegetable salad

**Day 4:**
- Breakfast: Omelette with whole wheat toast and low-fat milk
- Lunch: Brown rice, mixed lentil soup, and whole wheat roti
- Dinner: Grilled fish, mixed vegetable curry

**Day 5:**
- Breakfast: Dosa with low-fat curd and fresh fruits
- Lunch: Brown rice, chickpea salad with cucumber
- Dinner: Chicken tikka with mixed vegetables and brown rice

**Day 6:**
- Breakfast: Whole wheat toast with scrambled eggs
- Lunch: Quinoa and vegetable salad
- Dinner: Grilled chicken, mixed vegetable curry

**Day 7:**
- Breakfast: Idli with low-fat curd and fresh fruits
- Lunch: Brown rice, lentil salad with cucumber
- Dinner: Grilled fish, mixed vegetable salad

**Eat More:** brown rice, whole wheat roti, green vegetables, citrus fruits, almonds

**Avoid:** fatty meats, processed snacks, high-sugar drinks, fried foods, excess salt

**Tips:**
Drink 2 liters of water daily
Incorporate strength training exercises twice a week
Eat at least 3 meals and 3 snacks daily
